name: @chordjs/cli
description: The official CLI for Chord.js framework.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo templates && mkdir -p templates && cp -r ../../examples/basic-bot templates/basic && cp -r ../../examples/folder-routing-sharding templates/sharding && cp -r ../../examples/music-bot templates/music && bunx swc src -d dist --strip-leading-paths --config-file ../../.swcrc && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationMap --outDir dist && chmod +x dist/index.js
